name: Cajun-Style Chicken Nuggets
recipeInstructions:
You can use onion or onion-mushroom recipe soup mix in this recipe.
Chicken breasts should be cut into 1-inch pieces.
1. In a large bowl, combine the onion soup mix, bread crumbs, chili powder, cumin, thyme, and salt. Mix well.
2. Dip each chicken piece into the breadcrumb mixture, coating it thoroughly.
3. Heat 1/2 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook the chicken pieces, turning once to ensure even cooking. Drain on paper towels when done.
4. Serve warm with assorted mustards if desired.
MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS:
Follow steps 1-3 above. Place the coated chicken pieces in a 13 x 9-inch baking dish. Drizzle with 2 to 3 teaspoons of oil. Cover and heat at High (Full Power) for 6 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through. Remove from heat, rearrange the chicken if needed, and drain on paper towels before serving.
